roadmap.milestone_count_rationale: 5 milestones: Akshay is a beginner with foundational skills and 35 hours/week for 16 weeks. This allows for a balanced progression from interview-ready foundations to advanced SDE concepts and interview mastery, covering the breadth needed for product-based company placements.

vision_profile.current_state: A 3rd-year MITS Gwalior student with foundational full-stack and DSA skills, eager for an off-campus placement.
vision_profile.main_blocker: Refining problem-solving and system design skills to meet the specific demands of off-campus interviews for product-based companies.
vision_profile.top_motivation: To secure a challenging and rewarding placement in a product-based company through off-campus opportunities.

milestones.label: M01
milestones.o: Successfully solve medium-hard DSA problems and articulate basic system design choices, demonstrating readiness for entry-level SDE interviews.
milestones.module_count_rationale: 3 modules because this milestone focuses on the core pillars for SDE interviews: advanced data structures, problem-solving, and foundational system design thinking.
milestones.identity_statement: You are becoming a confident problem-solver, equipped with the foundational technical skills to ace initial SDE interviews.

project.title: Build a Mini Code-Editor with Syntax Highlighting
project.description: Design and implement a basic web-based code editor that supports syntax highlighting for a chosen language (e.g., Python) and includes basic file operations. Focus on efficient data structures for text manipulation and a clean UI.
project.deliverable: A deployed web application with a functional code editor, a public Git repository, and a brief design document explaining architectural choices and DSA usage.
seeded_errors: The syntax highlighter fails to correctly parse multi-line comments, leading to incorrect highlighting for subsequent code.
File save operation intermittently corrupts file content due to race condition in concurrent writes.

modules.title: Advanced Data Structures & Algorithms
modules.skill_count_rationale: 6 skills to cover critical advanced data structures and algorithmic paradigms frequently tested in SDE interviews.

skills.title: Graph Algorithms (DFS, BFS, Dijkstra)
skills.why_this_skill: Graphs are fundamental for modeling relationships and are heavily tested in SDE interviews for pathfinding, network flow, and social network problems.

scenario.title: Debug a graph traversal leading to infinite loop

skills.title: Dynamic Programming (Memoization, Tabulation)
skills.why_this_skill: DP is crucial for solving complex optimization problems by breaking them into subproblems, a common pattern in competitive programming and interviews.

scenario.title: Optimize a DP solution for time complexity

skills.title: Tree Algorithms (BST, AVL, Segment Trees)
skills.why_this_skill: Trees are versatile data structures used in databases, compilers, and search algorithms, making them essential for SDEs.

scenario.title: Implement a custom tree traversal for specific data retrieval

skills.title: Hashing & Hash Tables
skills.why_this_skill: Hash tables offer efficient data storage and retrieval, critical for building fast applications and solving problems requiring quick lookups.

scenario.title: Resolve hash collision issues in a custom data store

skills.title: Advanced Sorting & Searching
skills.why_this_skill: Beyond basic sorts, understanding advanced techniques is vital for optimizing performance in large-scale data processing and complex algorithms.

scenario.title: Implement an efficient search on a massive, unsorted dataset

skills.title: Bit Manipulation & Math for Algorithms
skills.why_this_skill: Bitwise operations are essential for low-level optimizations and solving certain algorithmic problems efficiently, often appearing in advanced interview questions.

scenario.title: Optimize a data compression algorithm using bit manipulation

science.desc: Production debugging scenario for milestone skills
Production debugging scenario for milestone skills
Production debugging scenario for milestone skills

modules.title: Core Programming & Problem Solving
modules.skill_count_rationale: 6 skills to solidify core programming concepts, object-oriented design, and efficient code practices essential for SDE roles.

skills.title: Object-Oriented Programming (OOP)
skills.why_this_skill: OOP is a foundational paradigm for building modular, reusable, and maintainable software systems, critical for any SDE.

scenario.title: Refactor a monolithic function into an OOP design

skills.title: Functional Programming Concepts
skills.why_this_skill: Understanding functional paradigms improves code clarity, testability, and concurrency, valuable for modern software development.

scenario.title: Convert an imperative loop to a functional pipeline

skills.title: Concurrency & Multithreading Basics
skills.why_this_skill: Modern applications require handling multiple tasks simultaneously; understanding concurrency is vital for building responsive and efficient systems.

scenario.title: Identify and fix a race condition in a multi-threaded application

skills.title: Debugging & Testing Fundamentals
skills.why_this_skill: Writing robust code requires effective debugging and testing strategies to ensure reliability and correctness, a core SDE skill.

scenario.title: Write unit tests for a complex utility function

skills.title: Version Control with Git
skills.why_this_skill: Git is the industry standard for collaborative software development, essential for tracking changes, collaborating, and managing codebases.

scenario.title: Revert a faulty commit without losing subsequent work

skills.title: Code Optimization Techniques
skills.why_this_skill: Writing efficient code is crucial for product-based companies, ensuring applications perform well under load and scale effectively.

scenario.title: Identify and fix a performance bottleneck in a data processing script

modules.title: Introduction to System Design Thinking
modules.skill_count_rationale: 6 skills to introduce fundamental system design principles and common architectural patterns relevant for SDE interviews.

skills.title: Scalability Concepts (Vertical vs. Horizontal)
skills.why_this_skill: Understanding how to scale systems is critical for designing applications that can handle increasing user loads, a key aspect of product-based companies.

scenario.title: Design a URL shortener given traffic constraints

skills.title: Database Design Fundamentals
skills.why_this_skill: A solid understanding of database design is crucial for building efficient and reliable data storage solutions for any application.

scenario.title: Choose the right database type for a real-time analytics platform

skills.title: API Design Principles (REST, Idempotency)
skills.why_this_skill: Well-designed APIs are the backbone of modern distributed systems, enabling seamless communication between services and clients.

scenario.title: Design a robust API for a ride-sharing service

skills.title: Caching Strategies
skills.why_this_skill: Caching is a fundamental technique for improving application performance and reducing database load, essential for scalable systems.

scenario.title: Implement a caching layer for a high-traffic e-commerce product catalog

skills.title: Basic Distributed Systems Concepts
skills.why_this_skill: Understanding distributed systems is fundamental for building modern, resilient, and scalable applications that run across multiple machines.

scenario.title: Identify consistency issues in a distributed ledger system

skills.title: Trade-offs in System Design
skills.why_this_skill: Making informed trade-offs between performance, cost, complexity, and reliability is a hallmark of an experienced SDE.

scenario.title: Evaluate design choices for a real-time chat application under high load

science.desc: Explain the trade-offs in designing a social media feed, considering consistency, availability, and latency.

milestones.label: M02
milestones.o: Design, implement, and deploy robust and scalable backend services using modern API design principles and efficient database solutions.
milestones.module_count_rationale: 3 modules to cover the essential aspects of backend development: API design, database management, and distributed systems fundamentals.
milestones.identity_statement: You are now building the robust, scalable engines that power modern applications, mastering the art of backend engineering.

project.title: Scalable E-commerce Backend API
project.description: Develop a RESTful API for an e-commerce platform, including user authentication, product catalog, order management, and payment integration. Focus on scalability, database efficiency, and secure API design.
project.deliverable: A deployed backend API with comprehensive API documentation (e.g., Swagger), a public Git repository, and a performance report for key endpoints.
seeded_errors: The product search endpoint experiences significant latency under moderate load due to inefficient database queries.
User authentication tokens are not properly invalidated, leading to potential security vulnerabilities after logout.

modules.title: API Design & Development
modules.skill_count_rationale: 6 skills to master the design and implementation of professional-grade APIs, including RESTful principles, security, and documentation.

skills.title: RESTful API Design & Best Practices
skills.why_this_skill: REST is the most common architectural style for web services; mastering it is crucial for building interoperable and scalable backends.

scenario.title: Refactor a non-RESTful API to adhere to REST principles

skills.title: API Authentication & Authorization
skills.why_this_skill: Securing APIs is paramount. Understanding authentication (who you are) and authorization (what you can do) is a core SDE responsibility.

scenario.title: Implement JWT-based authentication for a new microservice

skills.title: Microservices Architecture
skills.why_this_skill: Microservices enable independent deployment and scaling of services, crucial for large, complex applications in product companies.

scenario.title: Decompose a monolithic application into microservices

skills.title: API Gateway & Management
skills.why_this_skill: API Gateways are crucial for managing, securing, and routing requests to microservices, simplifying client interaction and enhancing control.

scenario.title: Configure an API Gateway for a new set of microservices

skills.title: Event-Driven Architecture
skills.why_this_skill: EDA promotes loose coupling and scalability, enabling complex systems to react to events in real-time, a common pattern in modern distributed systems.

scenario.title: Design an event-driven system for real-time order processing

skills.title: gRPC API Development
skills.why_this_skill: gRPC offers high-performance, language-agnostic communication, ideal for internal microservice communication where efficiency is key.

scenario.title: Migrate a REST endpoint to a gRPC service for improved performance

skills.why_this_skill: SQL remains crucial for many backend systems; advanced querying and optimization are key for efficient data retrieval and manipulation.

skills.why_this_skill: ORMs simplify database interactions in application code, improving developer productivity and reducing boilerplate.

skills.title: Distributed Databases & Sharding
skills.why_this_skill: For massive scale applications, distributed databases and sharding are essential techniques to handle large data volumes and high throughput.

skills.why_this_skill: Protecting sensitive data is paramount. Understanding database security and auditing ensures compliance and prevents breaches.
lessons: Data Encryption at Rest and In Transit

modules.skill_count_rationale: 6 skills to introduce core concepts of distributed systems and cloud computing, essential for building modern, scalable, and resilient applications.

skills.title: Cloud Computing Basics (IaaS, PaaS, SaaS)

skills.why_this_skill: Consensus algorithms are critical for ensuring data consistency and fault tolerance in distributed systems, a complex but vital topic.

skills.title: Fault Tolerance & Resilience
skills.why_this_skill: Designing systems that can withstand failures and recover gracefully is paramount for high-availability applications in product companies.

skills.title: Serverless Architectures (FaaS)
skills.why_this_skill: Serverless computing offers auto-scaling and cost efficiency, enabling developers to focus on code rather than infrastructure management.

skills.why_this_skill: Securing cloud deployments and understanding network configurations are critical for protecting applications and data in the cloud.

skills.title: Cloud Cost Optimization
skills.why_this_skill: Managing cloud costs efficiently is a critical skill for SDEs, ensuring applications are not only performant but also economically viable.

milestones.label: M03
milestones.o: Develop interactive and responsive frontends, seamlessly integrate them with backend APIs, and implement robust deployment pipelines for full-stack applications.
milestones.module_count_rationale: 3 modules to cover modern frontend development, secure API integration, and fundamental deployment practices for full-stack applications.
milestones.identity_statement: You are now crafting complete, end-to-end applications, bringing user interfaces to life and connecting them to powerful backend services.

project.title: Real-time Collaborative Whiteboard Application
project.description: Build a full-stack real-time collaborative whiteboard application. Users can draw, add text, and see changes from other users instantly. Focus on frontend state management, WebSocket communication, and robust backend synchronization.
project.deliverable: A deployed full-stack application, a public Git repository, and a technical presentation on the real-time synchronization architecture.
seeded_errors: Real-time updates from one user are not consistently reflected on other users' whiteboards due to a race condition in WebSocket message handling.
The frontend experiences significant performance degradation when many users are drawing simultaneously, leading to UI freezes.

skills.why_this_skill: Building accessible and SEO-friendly websites ensures a wider audience reach and better search engine visibility, crucial for product success.

milestones.label: M04
milestones.o: Build, test, and deploy production-grade applications that are highly performant, observable, and resilient to failures, adhering to modern DevOps principles.
milestones.module_count_rationale: 3 modules to cover advanced testing, performance optimization, and containerization, crucial for building and maintaining production-ready systems.
milestones.identity_statement: You are now engineering systems for the real world, ensuring they are robust, efficient, and ready to handle the demands of production environments.

project.title: High-Performance Image Processing Service
project.description: Develop a microservice that accepts image uploads, performs various processing tasks (e.g., resizing, watermarking), and returns the processed image. Focus on performance optimization, containerization, and robust error handling.
project.deliverable: A deployed, containerized microservice with a public API, comprehensive test suite, and a monitoring dashboard showing performance metrics.
seeded_errors: The image processing service crashes intermittently under high load due to memory leaks in the image manipulation library.
Processed images are occasionally corrupted due to race conditions when writing to shared storage in a distributed setup.

milestones.label: M05
milestones.o: Master complex system design challenges, solve advanced algorithmic problems, and articulate technical solutions and leadership qualities in senior-level SDE interviews.

project.title: Distributed Real-time Analytics Platform
project.description: Design and prototype a distributed real-time analytics platform that ingests high-volume data streams, processes them, and provides low-latency query capabilities. Focus on architectural choices for scalability, fault tolerance, and data consistency.
project.deliverable: A detailed system design document, a working prototype of a key component (e.g., data ingestion pipeline), and a presentation defending architectural decisions.
seeded_errors: The real-time data processing pipeline experiences significant backpressure and data loss under peak load due to insufficient message queue capacity.
Query results from the analytics platform are occasionally inconsistent across different nodes due to eventual consistency issues without proper handling.

scenario.title: Solve a challenging competitive programming problem within a time limit

modules.title: Behavioral & Technical Interview Strategies
modules.skill_count_rationale: 6 skills to master the art of interviewing, covering behavioral questions, advanced technical communication, and negotiation tactics for senior SDE roles.

skills.title: Behavioral Interview Preparation (STAR Method)
skills.why_this_skill: Behavioral interviews assess soft skills and cultural fit; mastering the STAR method helps articulate experiences effectively.

scenario.title: Practice answering 'Tell me about a time you failed' using the STAR method

skills.title: Technical Communication & Whiteboarding
skills.why_this_skill: Clearly articulating complex technical ideas and solutions on a whiteboard is a critical skill for system design and coding interviews.

scenario.title: Whiteboard a solution to a complex distributed system problem

skills.title: Mock Interview Practice & Feedback
skills.why_this_skill: Consistent mock interview practice with constructive feedback is the most effective way to refine interview skills and build confidence.

scenario.title: Participate in a full-length mock SDE interview and receive detailed feedback

skills.title: Resume & LinkedIn Optimization
skills.why_this_skill: A strong resume and LinkedIn profile are essential for attracting recruiters and securing interview opportunities.

scenario.title: Revise your resume and LinkedIn profile based on target job descriptions

skills.title: Offer Negotiation Strategies
skills.why_this_skill: Effective negotiation can significantly impact career earnings and job satisfaction; mastering it is a valuable professional skill.

scenario.title: Simulate a salary negotiation for a job offer

skills.title: Career Growth & Mentorship Planning
skills.why_this_skill: Proactive career planning and seeking mentorship are key for continuous professional development and long-term success as an SDE.

scenario.title: Develop a 3-year career plan for an SDE role, including skill development and mentorship goals

science.desc: Lead a mock system design interview for a complex product, demonstrating strong technical communication, problem decomposition, and architectural decision-making.
